query: I just finished analyzing some docs and created strategic_analysis.md, email_analysis.md, and gap_analysis.md in my Google Drive folder at /mnt/c/Users/me/My Drive/Projects/Case files/ — can you show me where those files are so I can open them?
I wrote a python script that outputs results to /home/user/projects/data-pipeline/output/results.csv — can you remind me where that file ended up?
can you check what's running on my server at 192.168.1.50 and also pull up the monitoring dashboard and cameras?
I need to ssh into my server but ssh keeps failing with 'permission denied'. I'm using 1password for my keys
I have a file at C:\Users\me\Downloads\invoice_march_2026.pdf that I need to parse — can you read it?
I'm trying to edit /etc/nginx/nginx.conf on my remote host but sed -i keeps silently failing, what's going on?
copy the contents of that yaml file to my clipboard so I can paste it into the web UI
I just created a report at /home/user/projects/docs/energy_report.html — how do I open it in my browser?
my shell script keeps failing with a weird error about \r characters, what's wrong?
can you list all the yaml config files and tell me which ones configure thermostats?
write me an automation that turns off the shop lights at 11pm every night
what's the current state of sensor.battery_soc? is the battery charging or discharging?
can you help me debug this jinja2 template? it's returning 'unavailable' instead of the power value
add a new modbus register for the inverter PV voltage at register 0x0107
set up a cron job that runs my backup script every day at 3am
can you check the git log and tell me what changed in the last 5 commits?
install numpy and pandas in my python virtualenv
read the modbus register manual in the manuals/ folder and summarize the battery registers
what DNS server is handling resolution for my local domains?
